array.string:
PORT="${SEATALK_CDP_PORT:-19222}"
# Already running with debug port and CDP responding? Nothing to do. if pgrep -f "remote-debugging-port" > /dev/null 2>&1; then if curl -sS --connect-timeout 2 "http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}/json" 2>/dev/null | head -c 10 | grep -q .; then exit 0 fi fi
# Use seatalk-restart-debug.sh if available (handles Electron 30+ app.asar patching). SCRIPT_DIR="${SEATALK_SKILL_DIR:-__SKILL_DIR__}/scripts" if [ -x "$SCRIPT_DIR/seatalk-restart-debug.sh" ]; then exec bash "$SCRIPT_DIR/seatalk-restart-debug.sh" fi
# Fallback: kill and relaunch with CLI args. if pgrep -f "SeaTalk.app/Contents/MacOS/SeaTalk" > /dev/null 2>&1; then killall SeaTalk 2>/dev/null || true sleep 2 fi open -a SeaTalk --args --remote-debugging-port="$PORT" --remote-allow-origins="http://127.0.0.1:${PORT}"
